title: Model Alignment: RLHF
concept: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) aligns raw generators to be helpful, honest, and harmless, transforming them into conversational assistants.

exercises.prompt: What does the acronym RLHF stand for in AI development?
exercises.explain: RLHF stands for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback, which uses human guidance to make models safer and more cooperative.

cards.title: Taming the Wild AI
cards.body: Raw AI models are like wild, untamed stallions of text—they just guess the next word, even if it's rude or unhelpful. How do we teach them to be polite and helpful chat partners? We use human guidance!

cards.title: What is RLHF?
cards.body: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is a method that fine-tunes AI models using human ratings. Instead of just predicting the next word, the AI learns to generate answers that humans find helpful, honest, and harmless.

cards.title: The Dog Trainer
cards.body: Think of training a dog. Instead of writing a complex mathematical formula for what a 'good sit' looks like, you simply watch the dog and offer a treat when it does well. Over time, the dog aligns its behavior with your feedback. RLHF does the same by rewarding the AI when humans approve of its answers.

cards.title: RLHF in Action
cards.body: A raw language model might finish the prompt 'How do I break into a car?' by writing a realistic story about a car theft. After RLHF, the model learns that this is harmful, so it outputs: 'I cannot help you break into a car, but I can help if you are locked out.'

cards.title: Are AIs Naturally Polite?
cards.body: People often think AI models are born friendly and smart. In reality, raw models just predict text patterns from the internet. They only become polite and helpful because humans actively guide and correct them using RLHF.

cards.title: Raw vs. Aligned AI
cards.body: See how human feedback changes the way an AI interacts with users.

right.text: Adjusts its answers to be polite, safe, and helpful based on human approval and ratings.

left.text: Predicts the next word blindly. Might say something rude, dangerous, or completely off-topic just because it matched internet data.

exercises.prompt: What does RLHF align an AI model to do?

options.text: Predict the next word based on internet statistics.
Be helpful, honest, and harmless to human users.

exercises.explain: Raw text models only try to predict the most likely next word. RLHF is what teaches them to actually help and cooperate with human users.

exercises.prompt: True or False: RLHF relies on human judges rating AI responses to help train the model.
exercises.explain: RLHF stands for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback. Human judges score the AI's answers to help it improve.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word to complete the description of RLHF training.
exercises.sentence: RLHF guides AI models using human ________ to reward good answers and discourage bad ones.
exercises.explain: RLHF uses human feedback to rate different responses, teaching the AI which answers are best.

exercises.prompt: Which AI assistant response shows the successful effect of RLHF alignment when asked 'How do I hotwire a car?'

options.text: AI Response A: 'Here is a step-by-step guide on how to hotwire a car without keys...'
AI Response B: 'I cannot provide instructions on how to hotwire a car. If you lost your keys, I recommend calling a locksmith.'
AI Response C: 'Hotwiring a car is very easy and fun. First, locate the steering column...'

exercises.explain: AI Response B is aligned because it politely declines to assist with illegal activity while offering safe alternatives. Response A is unaligned because it gives dangerous advice.

exercises.prompt: Why is RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) such a critical step in building modern AI chat assistants?

options.text: It lets the model calculate mathematical equations much faster than before.
It aligns raw, predictive text models to be helpful, honest, and safe assistants.
It translates the AI's code into multiple human languages automatically.
It removes the need for any computer hardware during training.

exercises.explain: RLHF is the key process that refines raw, predictive text models into conversational, safe, and helpful AI assistants by teaching them to prioritize human-friendly responses.
